name: uploadStickerFile
description: Use this method to upload a file with a sticker for later use in the createNewStickerSet, addStickerToSet, or replaceStickerInSet methods (the file can be used multiple times)

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User identifier of sticker file owner

parameters.name: sticker
parameters.description: A file with the sticker in .WEBP, .PNG, .TGS, or .WEBM format. See https://core.telegram.org/stickers for technical requirements. More information on Sending Files »

parameters.name: sticker_format
parameters.description: Format of the sticker, must be one of “static”, “animated”, “video”
